name: Big Pawn
description_short: Big Pawn is a Chicago-based pawn and auction service offering collateral-based loans and merchandise sales through AuctionZip's online bidding platform.
description_long: Big Pawn operates as a pawn shop and auction house based in Chicago, Illinois, with a physical location at 10226 Indianapolis Ave in the 60617 zip code. The company is registered on AuctionZip, a national online auction platform, under Auctioneer ID #38905, suggesting it conducts both traditional pawn transactions and auction sales of merchandise. The business is operated under the management of Roger Gunderson, with contact support available through Jeremy Conkline. Big Pawn's primary service model centers on collateral-based lending—a traditional pawn shop function where customers can receive short-term loans by pledging personal items of value as security. Beyond lending, the company participates in AuctionZip's ecosystem, which indicates they may also handle merchandise sales, liquidation, and auction services. The company maintains a dedicated website at bigpawn.net for customer access and information. However, the available website content is limited to directory and registration information on AuctionZip rather than detailed service descriptions or business operations data. This limits full transparency about specific loan terms, interest rates, redemption policies, or fee structures. The business appears to operate within the traditional pawn industry, serving customers in the Chicago area who need quick access to cash against collateral or are interested in purchasing auctioned merchandise.
pros: Operates through AuctionZip, a established national online auction platform with broad reach
Located in Chicago with accessible physical address for in-person transactions
Registered auctioneer status (ID #38905) suggests legitimate, regulated operations
Maintains dedicated website (bigpawn.net) for customer access and information
Multiple contact channels available (phone: 608-658-2219, email, web)
Participates in online bidding system, offering potential broader customer access to merchandise
cons: Limited transparency on website—no published loan terms, APR rates, or fee schedules available
No customer reviews, testimonials, or service quality indicators visible on provided listing
Sparse business information online makes it difficult to verify current service offerings or inventory
Phone number (608-658-2219) has Wisconsin area code despite Chicago business address, raising potential operational clarity questions
No published details on redemption policies, loan duration, or interest calculation methods
best_for: Chicago-area residents needing quick cash against personal collateral (jewelry, electronics, instruments)
Individuals seeking to purchase merchandise or collectibles through online auction bidding
People looking for traditional pawn services without credit checks or financial history requirements
diagnosis: Big Pawn is best for Chicago residents who need immediate cash secured by personal collateral and prefer working with a traditional pawn operation. The main caveat is the lack of published rate transparency and limited online documentation of terms—customers should call directly (608-658-2219) to verify current loan terms, interest rates, and redemption policies before transacting.
services: Online auction bidding through AuctionZip platform
Online auction listing and catalog access
